acceptance_criteria: Notebook executes with nbclient from the chapter directory.
visual-storyboard.json contains chapter-specific concepts and library routing.
three-form-volume-checks.json and final-sanity.json contain only chapter-relevant assertions.
Artifacts are concept-named and stored under artifacts/chapter-35.

artifact_plan.checks: JSON source span, storyboard, symbolic/numeric checks, and final sanity
artifact_plan.html: Plotly rotatable box and pullback density

chapter_goal: Understand a 3-form as an oriented volume meter whose signs and zeros are forced by alternation.
computational_checks: alternating determinant changes sign under slot swap
2-form wedge 1-form cyclic formula equals the determinant
three 1-form wedge expansion equals the six-term determinant
spherical coordinate pullback determinant is r**2*sin(phi)
odd self-wedge is zero and the spacetime 2-form example squares to 2 times the 4-volume form
all concept-named artifacts exist and have nonzero size
concept_inventory: Alternating 3-slots force repeated directions to vanish.
The volume 3-form evaluates to the determinant of edge coordinates.
The wedge of a 2-form and a 1-form is graded-commutative with sign (-1)^(2*1)=+1.
The wedge of three 1-forms is the determinant of their evaluation matrix.
The pullback of dx wedge dy wedge dz under spherical coordinates is the Jacobian determinant times dr wedge dphi wedge dtheta.
Basis 3-forms are indexed by distinct triples; there are binomial(n,3) of them in n dimensions.
Odd-degree forms wedge with themselves to zero, but even-degree forms need not.
implementation_notes: All helpers are notebook-local. Only the assigned notebook and artifacts/chapter-35 are written.

library_routing_table.representation: rotatable parallelepiped plus static sign comparison
library_routing_table.why: a 3-form is spatial and orientation is clearer when the box can be rotated; static PNG keeps the artifact durable
the proof is a state transition from alternation plus equality of slots to zero

library_routing_table.fallback: plain markdown table generated from Python lists
library_routing_table.representation: signed ledger table and cyclic term chart
library_routing_table.why: the learner needs to inspect each signed term, not just the final determinant

library_routing_table.fallback: SymPy text check plus Matplotlib static figure
library_routing_table.representation: symbolic Jacobian, local coordinate edge box, and density surface
library_routing_table.why: the exact determinant and geometric edge lengths are both central
basis availability and sign parity are combinatorial ledgers

proof_visualization_strategy: Use a NetworkX proof-state graph for repeated directions and a swap-count ledger for graded commutativity; both expose the sign changes as visible proof states.
risks: Plotly HTML display depends on browser support, so static PNG companions are also generated.
Matplotlib 3D is not a full CAD model; determinant and edge-length checks carry the numerical validation.

source_span_read.notes: Source span extracted for orientation only; no source prose, exercise text, figures, page crops, or screenshots are copied.

visual_sequence.learner_inspection_target: Swapping two input slots reverses the sign but not the absolute volume.
The same input equals its negative after swapping equal slots, so the output is zero.
visual_sequence.validation: every ordered triple in a two-element basis repeats an index

visual_sequence.learner_inspection_target: The six signed tensor terms and the three cyclic 2-form terms give the same determinant.
visual_sequence.validation: six-term sum equals determinant and cyclic formula equals determinant

visual_sequence.concept: spherical volume Jacobian and pullback density
visual_sequence.learner_inspection_target: A coordinate box with edges dr, r dphi, r sin(phi) dtheta has volume density r**2 sin(phi).
Basis 3-forms are distinct triples, so C(2,3)=0, C(3,3)=1, and C(4,3)=4.
Moving p one-forms past q one-forms performs p*q swaps.
visual_sequence.validation: sign matrix equals (-1)^(p*q), odd self-sign is -1

visual_sequence.learner_inspection_target: A calibrated volume meter catches slot swaps, repeated slots, and coordinate determinant scaling.
visual_sequence.validation: sample volumes flip sign under swap and scale by det(A) under a linear map
